ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the administrator is responsible for */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator within the organization */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_administrators_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that recorded the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "mean_temp" REAL /* Mean temperature recorded */,
  "tot_rainfall" REAL /* Total rainfall recorded */,
  "tot_snowfall" REAL /* Total snowfall recorded */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Average wind direction */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  "sunshine_duration" REAL /* Duration of sunshine in hours */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature reading */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the reading belongs to */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time the reading was taken */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity at the time of the reading */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure at the time of the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_readings_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_data" (
  "precipitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the precipitation belongs to */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation (rainfall or snowfall) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the precipitation event */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the precipitation event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precipitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login to the system */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active or inactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or teams the report is shared with */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility level of the report (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_contents" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report content */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the content belongs to */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., text, chart, image) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_contents_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the climate model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the climate model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model in percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_model_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate model run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate model being run */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the model was run */,
  "output" TEXT /* Output of the model run */,
  "run_duration" REAL /* Duration of the model run in minutes */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the model run (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_model_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES climate_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model input */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate model run the input belongs to */,
  "input_name" TEXT /* Name of the input */,
  "input_value" REAL /* Value of the input */,
  "input_source" TEXT /* Source of the input data (e.g., weather station, historical data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_inputs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES climate_model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model output */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate model run the output belongs to */,
  "output_name" TEXT /* Name of the output */,
  "output_value" REAL /* Value of the output */,
  "output_source" TEXT /* Source of the output data (e.g., climate model, forecast) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES climate_model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate model used to generate the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was generated */,
  "forecast" TEXT /* Forecast data */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast in percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES climate_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that recorded the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "mean_temp" REAL /* Mean temperature recorded */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Average wind direction */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  "sunshine_duration" REAL /* Duration of sunshine in hours */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)
